name: Obregonia denegrii Fric
description: По данным GBIF (коллекция UNAM). Морфология и синонимы будут добавлены.
morphology_stem: Obregonia, the artichoke cactus, is a monotypic genus of cacti, containing the species Obregonia denegrii. The species is endemic to the state of Tamaulipas in Mexico.
